description: CompositionRed round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, ribbed neckline and graphic print on the chest FitRegularWash careMachine wash with warm water of 40 degreesWash inside out with like coloursDo not bleach or iron on printDry in shadeThis t-shirt from locomotive is a crafty take on casual wear for men. With a dominant boxing theme print on the front, this tee turns the typical alpha male stereotype on its head. Crafted with a narrow silhouette, this piece can be worn with casual ensembles. Wear this with denims, a tee and casual suede shoes.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
